narration.act1_scene1_storyteller_1: Although his wealth was overflowing, Jakyp-bai's heart was breaking and tears flowed from his eyes as he had no son. Descendant of Tugol Khan, crying to the creator.
narration.act1_scene1_jakyp_1:
I gathered livestock, but I have no child,
I pray to the Creator –
I have no strength more to wait.
narration.act1_scene1_storyteller_2: That night Jakyp-bai had a dream, a dream so wondrous his heart pounded. He dreamt he caught a giant white falcon on the peak of Ala-Too.
narration.act1_scene1_jakyp_2: Oh, Creator! What a dream I had tonight! The ancestors' spirits must be appeased!
narration.act1_scene1_choice_q: Where should Jakyp pray at dawn?
narration.act1_branch_a_storyteller_1: Jakyp went to the ancestors' graves and prayed to the creator.
narration.act1_branch_a_jakyp_1: Oh, spirits, protect me! Give me a son!
narration.act1_branch_a_sys_1:
(You prayed to your ancestors)
**System notification:** You received the codex entry 'Lineage of Tugol Khan'!
narration.act1_branch_b_jakyp_1: My horses number in the tens of thousands, will they all be left without a master?
narration.act1_branch_b_sys_1:
(You visited your infinite herds)
**System notification:** You received the codex entry 'Jakyp's Wealth'!
narration.act1_scene2_storyteller_1: Nine months and nine days passed, and the mighty Manas was born.
narration.act1_scene2_chiyirdi_1: My dear child! He grasps black blood in his right hand, yellow gold in his left. This is no ordinary boy!
narration.act1_scene2_storyteller_2: The child was named Manas. A fierce blue lion and a black leopard invisible to others guarded him.
narration.act1_scene2_spy_1: It was written that Manas would be born from the buruts. I must slice his throat in the cradle!
narration.act1_scene2_storyteller_3: But infant Manas jumped from the cradle and grabbed the spy's spear. Thus Manas came into the world!
narration.act2_scene1_storyteller_1:
When noble Manas grew up,
And turned fourteen,
At fourteen he became Khan,
All the Oirots were astonished.
Raised on a white felt rug as Khan, the scattered Kyrgyz tribes united under one banner.
narration.act2_scene1_bakai_1:
My dear child Manas!
For all my people,
You have become the support.
You gathered the scattered,
You united the disconnected.
Now the time has come to lead the people and not yield our honor to the enemy!
narration.act2_scene1_manas_1:
My Kyrgyz people, for you,
I shall shed my blood!
I will attack Beijing,
I will exact revenge on Konurbai!
If my strength fails,
Let my life be cut short!
narration.act2_scene1_storyteller_2: Before setting out on the Great Campaign, a council was held. On Manas's right stood the wise Bakai, on his left stood the clairvoyant, skillful Kanykei.
narration.act2_scene1_choice_q: Who should Manas listen to before the Great Campaign?
narration.act2_branch_a_manas_1:
Uncle Bakai, tell me!
Konurbai of Beijing,
What is his strength like?
narration.act2_branch_a_bakai_1:
The khan of Beijing, Konurbai,
His fortress is like an iron mountain,
His court is like a fire-breathing dragon.
His steed is Algara,
Whom no man dares approach.
But, my hero, your fury makes the mountains of Beijing crumble. If we stand united as one, we will win!
narration.act2_branch_a_sys_1:
(You asked Bakai)
**System notification:** You received the codex entry 'Enemies: Konurbai and Algara'. Grants tactical advantage in Act III.
narration.act2_branch_b_kanykei_1:
My lord, hear my words!
I have seen an evil dream,
The road to Beijing is bloody.
The impenetrable armor Akolpok,
I crafted with my own hands.
The spear and the rifle Akkelte,
I have prepared them all.
Be careful, my lion!
narration.act2_branch_b_sys_1:
(You listened to Kanykei)
**System notification:** You received the codex entry 'Akolpok Armor'. Reduces damage taken in Act III battles.
narration.act2_scene2_storyteller_1: Fleeing China and embracing the Muslim path, the hero Almambet joined Manas. Sacrificing a white mare and drinking its blood, the two heroes swore to be blood brothers until the end of days.
narration.act2_scene2_almambet_1:
I have forsaken my parents,
You have become my sworn friend!
I have given my soul to you,
I will lead the way to Beijing,
I will sever Konurbai's head!
narration.act2_scene2_manas_2:
My blood brother Almambet!
The day I found you,
My head reached the skies!
Become the leader of my choro,
Lead the path of the army!
narration.act2_scene2_storyteller_2: Forty choro set off! The earth trembled, dust covered the sky, Manas's army set off on the Great Campaign towards Beijing. Ahead lay a bloody battle, a struggle between life and death!
narration.act3_scene1_storyteller_1: Day and night without rest, marching for forty days across the desert, Khan Manas's massive army descended upon the walls of Beijing. The sky was clear, but the earth was dark with men. Konurbai, the Khan of Beijing, had fortified his gates against the approaching Buruts.
narration.act3_scene1_manas_1: Elder Bakai! No one has dared to question Beijing before. Let us divide the forty choro and test the might of the Chinese! Before joining the battle, let us inspect the troops.
narration.act3_scene1_choice_q: Whose positions should Manas inspect before the great battle?
narration.act3_branch_a_almambet_1: Khan Manas, hear my words! When I was in Beijing, I learned the secrets of its forty gates. They have trenches and deadly traps prepared. But our army is ready. We will rain down arrows like hail and destroy the enemy's path!
narration.act3_branch_a_sys_1:
(You inspected Almambet's flank)
**System notification:** You received the codex entry 'Almambet's Tactics'. Reduces damage taken from initial attacks in the final duel.
narration.act3_branch_b_chubak_1: My dear Khan Manas! Your forty choro, who do not fear death, stand ready! We will shatter their ranks with our spears and spill their blood like a river! With a battle cry, we will give Beijing to the Kyrgyz!
narration.act3_branch_b_sys_1:
(You inspected Chubak's flank)
**System notification:** You received the codex entry 'Chubak's Fury'. Increases counter-attack power in the final duel.
narration.act3_scene2_storyteller_1: Dyed in red blood, sparing no lives, a fierce battle broke out! Almambet tore through the center, Chubak slaughtered the flanks, and the majestic Manas charged in alone, devastating the Chinese!
narration.act3_scene2_konurbay_1: Curse your father, you cunning Burut! I will capture you now, Manas! I will crush you beneath my heel and scatter your remnants! Come, Manas, face me in single combat!
narration.act3_scene2_storyteller_2: Furious, Manas roared. His steed Akkula flew like a bird. Manas struck Konurbai with his spear! Unable to withstand the heat, Konurbai's horse Algara turned and fled like a fox. The Kalmak escaped!
narration.act3_scene2_storyteller_3: Konurbai fled into the fortress of Beijing. The massacre halted. At the break of dawn, as light touched the earth, the magnanimous Manas performed his ablutions and prepared for his morning prayer.
narration.act3_scene3_storyteller_1: He had taken off his impenetrable armor, Akolpok. He was praying to the Creator, bowing his head in submission. In that moment, Konurbai, the treacherous dog, sneaked up from behind in secret!
narration.act3_scene3_storyteller_2: The Khan of the monks, Konurbai, gripping his battle axe with both hands, struck Manas on the back of the neck as he spoke the call to prayer!
narration.act3_scene3_storyteller_3: Manas cried 'Ah!' and collapsed! Struck by the heavy axe, he fell headfirst. The wounded Manas bled out, and the light of the universe faded... A dark night fell upon the Kyrgyz people!

ui.auto_forward_time_description: Choose the time in seconds before the dialogue auto-forwards. If "{{textSpeedName}}" is enabled, the auto-forward will be executed after the typewriter effect is completed. (You can edit this value if "{{autoName}}" is enabled)
ui.language_description: Choose the language of the game.
ui.primary_color_description: Choose the primary color for the theme.
ui.solid_color_description: Choose the solid color for the theme. It can be black or white and will be contrasting with the primary color. So if the primary color is dark, the solid color will be white, and a the other way around.
ui.text_speed_description: Choose the speed of the typewriter effect. If is set to 0 ( off ) the text will appear instantly.
ui.theme_mode_description: Choose between light, dark, or system theme mode.

ui.you_sure_to_load_save: Are you sure you want to load this save file?
ui.you_sure_to_return_main_menu: Are you sure you want to return to the main menu? All unsaved progress will be lost.
